title: Anti-AI-Slop Review Aspect Implementation Plan
summary: Step-by-step implementation guide for adding a slop-detection review aspect with code and prose pattern catalogs to the pr-review skill.
notes: Implementation runbook paired with companion design spec. Contains inline markdown content snippets meant to be copied verbatim into files. Structured as 5 sequential tasks with checkpoint verifications, lint tests, and commit messages. Procedural tone emphasizes systematic execution via agentic tools (subagent-driven-development or executing-plans). Pattern deduplication rules (Rule A: named-pattern discipline; Rule B: cross-aspect deferral) are central to design.
